---
name: Feature template
about: This template is used to create issue for individual task to be completed,
  generally size should be 1 PR per issue.
title: Short description of the task i.e. Create GET /recipes endpoint
labels: ''
assignees: ''
type: Task

---

## What
<!-- One sentence: what needs to be built or changed -->
<!-- Example: Create the `GET /recipes` endpoint that returns all recipes from the database. -->

## Why
<!-- One sentence: why this matters or what it unblocks -->
<!-- Example: The recipe feed page needs this to display dishes to the user on load. -->

## Acceptance criteria
<!-- Specific, testable outcomes — each item should be verifiable -->
<!-- Example: - [ ] `GET /recipes` returns a JSON array of all recipes -->
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Notes
<!-- Optional: relevant files, endpoints, DB tables, design references -->
